testCases.title: E2E: Full Purchase Flow with Configurable Product - Admin Create to Order History
testCases.notes: Order CO260324-00005 placed successfully. Checkout Bike with Sport Wheels ($150 base + $50 = $200.00). Configuration preserved through PDP, cart, checkout, and order history. Components list in order detail shows 'AGENT-TEST-Config-Checkout-Sport-Wheels-20260324'. Order status: Payment required (CyberSource test env). Order total: $420.00 ($200 subtotal + $70 tax + $150 shipping).

testCases.title: E2E: Multiple Configurable Products in One Checkout
testCases.notes: Order CO260324-00006 placed with 2 configurable products: (1) Config Bike with Premium Seat at $245.00 ($200 base + $45), (2) Config Laptop with 16GB RAM + 512GB SSD at $1,174.00 ($999 base + $100 + $75). Cart subtotal $1,419.00 correct ($245 + $1,174). Each product configuration preserved independently in cart and checkout. Discount -$141.90 applied automatically. Final total: $1,712.52.

testCases.title: E2E: Cart Quantity Update Recalculates Line Total and Preserves Configuration
testCases.notes: Config Bike with Basic Seat at $215.00 ($200 base + $15). Added qty 3 from PDP -- note: each PDP increment creates a separate configurable line item (expected behavior for configurable products). First line item: qty 3 = $645.00 (3 x $215). After decreasing to qty 2: line total recalculated to $430.00 (2 x $215). Basic Seat configuration preserved after quantity change. Cart cleaned up after test.

testCases.title: E2E: Custom Engraving Text Preserved Through Cart and Checkout to Order History
testCases.notes: Precondition not met: Product 'Test Config Engraved Ring [YYYYMMDD]' required by CFG-E2E-017 was not included in the seeded product mapping. No product ID provided for the Engraved Ring. Cannot execute without the test product.

testCases.title: E2E: Hard Reload on Checkout Page Does Not Lose Configured Product or Configuration Details
testCases.notes: Order CO260324-00007 placed after hard reload. Checkout Bike with Sport Wheels at $200.00 added to cart. Navigated to cart/checkout page. Performed window.location.reload(true) (hard reload). Page reloaded correctly: no blank screen, no redirect to homepage. Configured product (Sport Wheels at $200.00) fully preserved in cart and order summary after reload. Checkout completed successfully. Total: $420.00.

testCases.title: E2E: Reorder Previously Purchased Configurable Product from Order History
testCases.notes: Navigated to Account > Order History. Found order CO260324-00005 with Config Checkout Bike + Sport Wheels at $200.00. Opened order detail. REORDER BUTTON NOT PRESENT on order detail page for configurable products. Product name is a clickable link to the PDP, allowing manual re-navigation and reconfiguration. Configuration details (Sport Wheels) visible via Components list expander. Cart total arithmetically correct. Documented behavior: no reorder function for configurable products; user must manually navigate to PDP to re-add.
